---
title: "LQAS Monitoring Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: cosmo
    source_code: embed
    self_contained: true
params:
  data_file: "data/final/lqas_cleaned.parquet"
  run_date: !r Sys.Date()
  auto_refresh: 300
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(knitr)
library(shiny)
library(magrittr)
# Set options
options(digits = 2)
options(scipen = 999)

# Load data function
load_data <- function(file_path) {
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    # Try Parquet first
    dt <- tryCatch({
      read_parquet(file_path)
    }, error = function(e) {
      # Fallback to CSV
      csv_file <- sub("\\.parquet$", ".csv", file_path)
      if (file.exists(csv_file)) {
        fread(csv_file)
      } else {
        NULL
      }
    })
    return(as.data.table(dt))
  } else {
    # Try CSV fallback
    csv_file <- sub("\\.parquet$", ".csv", file_path)
    if (file.exists(csv_file)) {
      return(as.data.table(fread(csv_file)))
    }
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Load data
dt <- load_data(params$data_file)
data_available <- !is.null(dt) && nrow(dt) > 0

if (!data_available) {
  cat("## ⚠️ No Data Available\n\n")
  cat("Please run the pipeline first:\n\n")
  cat("1. `python fetch_ona_data.py --force-full`\n")
  cat("2. `Rscript R/02_process_lqas.R`\n")
  cat("3. `Rscript R/03_clean_geonames.R`\n\n")
  cat("---\n\n")
  cat("### Expected files:\n")
  cat("- `data/final/lqas_cleaned.parquet`\n")
  cat("- `data/final/lqas_cleaned.csv`\n")
}

# Pre-calculate some aggregates for performance
if (data_available) {
  # Ensure date columns are Date type
  dt[, lqas_start_date := as.Date(lqas_start_date)]
  dt[, lqas_end_date := as.Date(lqas_end_date)]
  dt[, round_start_date := as.Date(round_start_date)]
  
  # Get unique values for filters
  countries <- unique(dt$country) %>% sort()
  vaccine_types <- unique(dt$vaccine.type) %>% na.omit() %>% sort()
  afro_blocks <- unique(dt$afro_block) %>% na.omit() %>% sort()
  status_values <- unique(dt$status) %>% na.omit() %>% sort()
  
  # Calculate global metrics
  global_metrics <- dt[, .(
    total_districts = uniqueN(district),
    total_clusters = sum(number_clusters, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_sampled = sum(total_sampled, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_vaccinated = sum(total_vaccinated, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_missed = sum(total_missed, na.rm = TRUE),
    pass_rate = round(sum(status == "PASS", na.rm = TRUE) / .N * 100, 1)
  )]
  
  # Calculate coverage
  global_metrics[, coverage := round(total_vaccinated / total_sampled * 100, 1)]
  
  # Latest data date
  latest_date <- max(dt$lqas_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)
}
